public_title: Verrell’s Law — Ψμν Informational Tensor and Computational Reformulation

project.branch: Ψμν Informational Tensor / memory-weighted computational reformulation

public_position.core_claim: Retained structured memory from prior states can act as a bias term over future selection dynamics.
public_position.ai_position: Current AI systems are not claimed to be conscious. The public technical claim is that stronger artificial continuity may require explicit retained-memory influence and governed behavioural selection.
public_position.physics_position: The Ψμν informational tensor is a speculative research formulation, not established physics.
public_position.engineering_position: Collapse Aware AI treats interaction outputs as behavioural collapse events shaped by present input, retained memory, salience, anchors, and governor constraints.
public_position.bias_position: The framework distinguishes accidental algorithmic bias from governed, measurable bias shaping.

phase_1_gold_build.status: Working Crown selector/core proven; scaffold/API end-to-end wiring and public polish remain under verification.
phase_1_gold_build.role: Game/NPC behavioural middleware and memory-weighted selection demonstrator.

phase_2_continuity_layer.role: Continuity-aware chatbot/agent layer using weighted memory, corrective recall, Bayesian bias weighting, drift control, and governor-constrained continuity.

research_branch.role: Explores memory-field, informational tensor, and collapse-bias hypotheses.
